examples: Warthog Pie, Namibia. Tastes like lean pork.
Kurt slowed the Warthog, and looked up at the sky.
He is saved by a warthog and another small unknown animal.
The mother warthog ran after him at a surprising speed, grunting and repelling him backward.
He was staring intently at a mother warthog, her four tiny piglets foraging nearby.
